hooks.command: node -e "const fp=(process.env.CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS||process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_file_path||'');if(/(^|[\\\\/])\.env(\.|$)|supabase\/.env|credentials\.json|secrets\.ya?ml/.test(fp)){console.error('BLOCKED: Bearbeitung von Secret/Env-Dateien ist gesperrt. Datei: '+fp);process.exit(1)}"

node -e "const fp=(process.env.CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS||process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_file_path||'');if(/(package-lock\.json|bun\.lock|bun\.lockb|yarn\.lock|pnpm-lock\.yaml)$/.test(fp)){console.error('BLOCKED: Lock-Files duerfen nur via Package-Manager geaendert werden. Datei: '+fp);process.exit(1)}"

node -e "const fp=(process.env.CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS||process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_file_path||'');if(/\.(ts|tsx)$/.test(fp)){const {execSync}=require('child_process');try{const out=execSync('npx --no-install tsc --noEmit -p .',{stdio:'pipe',encoding:'utf8'});console.log('tsc: OK')}catch(e){const msg=(e.stdout||'')+(e.stderr||'');const lines=msg.split('\\n').filter(l=>l.includes('error TS')).slice(0,10);if(lines.length){console.log('tsc errors (top 10):\\n'+lines.join('\\n'))}}}"
